data.body: Evidence for 'make lint && make typecheck && make test pass': the cross-facade edit/oversized rejection tests landed via Gerrit change 622 (Verified+1 from CI = build/test/lint/typecheck on GitHub Actions), merged to origin/main. Local runs are clean: make lint, make typecheck (304 files), and the full make test (5634 passed) all pass on the landed tree.
